caption:
George Russell remains the clear favorite to win the Japanese GP, but Kimi Antonelli’s win in China has increased his chances according to traders on kalshi 

After winning in Shanghai, Antonelli has climbed to a 23% chance of taking the top step at Suzuka, while Russell sits at 57%. Traders on Kalshi think Mercedes have the Japanese GP locked down but which driver crosses the line first ?

caption:
Our season starts this week! 
Join us on Patreon on Tuesday, 3rd March, for a close look at all the details in our 2026 liveries. 

And on Youtube on Wednesday, 4th March for our season opener episode. (It’s the longest video we’ve ever made(/making, still working on it).

This marks the first major evolutionary upgrade for our characters since 2020. Excited for a new season!
